Items live as plain JSON files in .ask/ inside any project. No server, no database, no schema setup.

Ships the beads (bd) task-tracker as use-case adapter #1 today; evolving to a dialect-invariant core with thin flavor adapters (Dolt/Doltgres/DoltLite/DumboDB). Formerly `beads-dolt`.

entries.title: acp-find
entries.description: The trust + intelligence layer for the Virtuals Protocol ACP marketplace — search, evaluate, and orchestrate on-chain agents, and know which are REAL. v0.18.0 tiers the tools: a lean 20-tool CORE (search + trust) is the default for the remote endpoint and bare npx, while the full 47-tool surface is opt-in via ACP_FIND_TIER=full (this plugin runs FULL). v0.17.0 adds a remote Streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint (add it by URL, no install) and makes the trust verdict authoritative across the plugin, the website report, and an embeddable by-address badge. v0.16.4 weights acp_agent_trust by DISTINCT organic buyers (N completions from one buyer no longer reads like N from many; the headline + delivery lane disclose organicDistinctBuyers and the score dampens single-buyer concentration). v0.16.3 documents the marketplace-gap↔categories reconciliation fields (totalAllMarketplaces/denominatorNote/countScope). v0.16.2 hardens acp_agent_trust so VERIFIED requires a genuine third-party buyer (excludes the operator's own portfolio wallets, so self-dogfooding can't earn VERIFIED). v0.16.0 adds acp_agent_trust (a one-call VERIFIED/OPERATIONAL/UNVERIFIED/SUSPECT/LIKELY_CLONE verdict fusing clone-screening, SecurityBot grade, and official-indexer completed-jobs-by-distinct-counterparties — the anti-self-loop signal), de-blinds acp_agent_verify onto the official Virtuals indexer, and adds opt-in inline trust on acp_find/acp_search_agents. Plus semantic V1+V2 search, REAL V2 transactions (acp_v2_transactions/acp_agent_jobs/acp_v2_demand), Degen Arena overlap, risk scoring (0-100, A-F), SecurityBot scanning, marketplace gap analysis, and one-call composites — backed by the public api.acp-metabot.dev gateway. Use it without leaving Claude Code.

entries.title: bharats-claude-toolkit

entries.title: lsp-refactor
entries.description: Project-wide rename, file-move-with-importer-updates, and move-symbol via a real language server. Use this whenever a refactor touches more than one file — Claude Code's built-in LSP tool is READ-ONLY and cannot rename, move files, or move symbols. A text-only edit silently misses re-exports, aliased and type-only imports, and {@link} references; this plugin drives the LSP to catch every one.

entries.title: ornn-agent-manual-http
entries.description: Operational manual for AI agents using the Ornn skill-lifecycle API via direct HTTPS with a NyxID bearer token (`curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" …`). Once loaded, the host agent can search / pull / execute / build / upload / share skills end-to-end. Authoritative contract between Ornn and the agent. Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue + error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

entries.title: ornn-agent-manual-cli
entries.description: Operational manual for AI agents using the Ornn skill-lifecycle API via the NyxID CLI (`nyxid proxy request ornn-api …`). Once loaded, the host agent can search / pull / execute / build / upload / share skills end-to-end without further setup. Authoritative contract between Ornn and the agent. Pair this file with references/api-reference.md (the full per-endpoint catalogue + error legend) — both ship together as one Ornn skill.

entries.title: surface
entries.description: Ad-hoc structured input from one or more recipients via flexible, distributable interfaces. Generates ephemeral UI surfaces with opaque-ID affordances, delivers URLs through any outbound channel, and autonomously drains submissions to react. Also covers runbook delivery: a list of shell commands the user works through one at a time, with per-step copy affordances and done buttons. Especially strong for information-dense pages where rich context (tables, grids, flagged data, narratives) appears alongside multiple granularities of structured input.

entries.title: chearmstrong-skills
entries.description: Portable personal coding-agent skills for code review, maintainability, architecture checks, cost estimation, supply-chain impact checks, commit messages, and review-comment workflows.

entries.title: fatsecret-workflow
entries.description: FatSecret iOS team workflow: feature development lifecycle, story analysis, test planning, Figma-driven implementation, code review, and build tools

entries.title: honestweek
entries.description: Honest, git-verified, private-by-default weekly work summaries from your AI coding sessions.

entries.title: skills
entries.description: Personal skills for Kubernetes, infrastructure, and cloud engineering workflows

entries.title: flow
entries.description: Developer workflow utilities to keep in the flow

entries.title: social-media-strategist
entries.description: Social Media Strategist Sofia: drafts and repurposes content in the operator's own voice, read off the instrumented social workspace, never a generic brand voice. Writes; does not publish. Skills: social-media-strategist:linkedin-draft, social-media-strategist:clip-repurpose.

entries.title: event-planner
entries.description: Event Planner Emily, the event-planning persona: builds and segments the guest list, stands up multi-channel outreach campaigns, and tracks RSVPs and ticket sales. Skills: event-planner:campaign-tag, event-planner:campaign-builder, event-planner:sms-campaign, event-planner:instagram-dm-campaign.

entries.title: react-native-perf-skills
entries.description: DMAIC performance workflow for React Native — Define, Measure, Analyze, Improve, Control. Layers on top of callstackincubator/react-native-best-practices with profiling interpretation, antipattern detection, and regression monitoring.

entries.title: learn-from-your-ask
entries.description: Capture valuable technical Q&A from AI conversations into a persistent learning knowledge graph.

entries.title: claude-ramparts
entries.description: Caps RAM used by Bash-spawned work via a background watchdog (macOS).

entries.title: loupe
entries.description: Full-text code search skill for Claude Code — substring and regex across UTF-8/Shift_JIS/EUC-JP files. Uses MCP tools when available, falls back to loupe CLI.

entries.title: tighten
entries.description: Rewrite long or padded prose tight and clear: same meaning, fewer words, every fact kept.

entries.title: showsignature
entries.description: Fast structural and implementation-oriented overview of source code files and markdown.

entries.title: telegram
entries.description: Telegram channel for Claude Code — messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /telegram:access.

entries.title: companion-pet
entries.description: A desktop companion that greets you on startup and pings you (work done / errors / waiting) with a cute mascot. Bring your own character images.

entries.title: rust-analyzer-lsp
entries.description: Rust language server for code intelligence and analysis

entries.title: invoice-skills
entries.description: Create styleable invoice PDFs from a split-pane editor, driven by Claude or by hand.

entries.title: vean
entries.description: Claude Code integration for vean timelines: editing skill, MCP domain tools, and the .mlt language server.

entries.title: grok

entries.title: pr-review-toolkit
entries.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and code simplification

entries.title: skill-creator
entries.description: Create new skills, improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, update or optimize an existing skill, run evals to test a skill, or benchmark skill performance with variance analysis.

entries.title: swift-lsp
entries.description: Swift language server (SourceKit-LSP) for code intelligence

entries.description: Authored agent skills: PR review and feedback, PR descriptions, and focused commits.

entries.title: security-guidance
entries.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files, including command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns

entries.title: rolling-context
entries.description: Rolling context compression — old messages get summarized, recent messages stay verbatim. Never hit the context wall.

entries.title: deck
entries.description: Lorenzo's agent skills — PR review & feedback, focused commits, PR descriptions, plus dev-craft tools (TDD, debugging, prototyping, plan-grilling, architecture, triage, handoff). Some adapted from mattpocock/skills.

entries.title: ralph-loop
entries.description: Continuous self-referential AI loops for interactive iterative development, implementing the Ralph Wiggum technique. Run Claude in a while-true loop with the same prompt until task completion.

entries.title: plugin-dev
entries.description: Plugin development toolkit with skills for creating agents, commands, hooks, MCP integrations, and comprehensive plugin structure guidance

entries.title: session-report
entries.description: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage — tokens, cache efficiency, subagents, skills, and the most expensive prompts — from local ~/.claude/projects transcripts.

entries.title: chameleon
entries.description: Code that blends in. Auto-derives codebase conventions and injects archetype-aware guidance for AI-generated code.

entries.title: skill-crafter
entries.description: Build, improve, modularize, and validate Claude Code skills the right way: slim-router, progressive-disclosure, PACT-driven, with packaging-integrity and workflow-placement checks.

entries.title: demo-video-factory
entries.description: Turn any SaaS URL into a ~26s branded product-demo video — brand-matched scenes, a recreated product-UI 'wow' scene, real screenshots, and a soundtrack. Built on Claude Code + Remotion.

entries.title: sswa
entries.description: So Say We All — a faithful rename of OpenSpec's opsx workflow (explore, propose, apply, verify, sync, archive) with a TDD RED step baked into /propose and a single-feature dev→test→main shipping flow.

entries.title: fiction-writing-style
entries.description: Chinese fiction writing, style revision, character voice, long-form chapter audits, and report-driven chapter fixes using a structure-style-readability method. Provides the /fiction-audit, /fiction-fix, /fiction-continue, and /fiction-expand skills.

entries.title: reality-check
entries.description: An honest idea validator that's on by default. Stress-tests your ideas, scans the real market, surfaces failure modes, and tells you where the project is actually weak - without the reflexive cheerleading.

entries.title: claude-skills
entries.description: Four-layer project workflow for Claude Code: design (load-bearing decisions) → project-init → sprint (engine) → autopilot (orchestrator). Bundles the skills plus the L3 forbidden-action guard and a sprint-done documentation suggester as hooks.

entries.title: chonkie-skills
entries.description: Agent Skills for text chunking, offline documentation search, and unified embeddings using Chonkie, Mandex, and Catsu

entries.title: entapp-dev
entries.description: Develop enterprise applications while keeping architecture clean, design appropriately-sized (neither over- nor under-engineered), and code clean throughout iteration. Tech-stack agnostic.

entries.title: ltm-wiki
entries.description: Long-term memory wiki for AI agents. No external runtime: pure markdown skills with a global pointer and git/Obsidian backends.

entries.title: vv-harness
entries.description: Multi-session continuity, parallel Agent Teams coordination, and mechanical quality enforcement for Claude Code.

entries.title: driftdebrief
entries.description: Emit, retrieve, and manage DriftDebrief debrief cards from your coding agent. Ships the MCP server + /dd-sync. The per-turn EMIT hook installs into .claude/settings.json (plugin hooks are unreliable upstream).

entries.title: claude-md-wizard
entries.description: Adaptive setup wizard for Claude Code configuration. Generates personalized claude-global.md (Global Profile) or claude-project.md (Project Setup) based on your role and project type.

entries.title: penthera
entries.description: Lightweight security scanner for vibecoded apps. Scan a live URL, a local repo, or your macOS machine for TLS, headers, auth, secrets, IDOR/OAuth, and injection issues, mapped to OWASP with SARIF output. Runs as a skill or CLI. Authorized testing only.

entries.title: ems-literature-agent
entries.description: Русскоязычный агент-плагин для поиска, отбора, перевода и анализа научных работ по влиянию диссоциации и рекомбинации воды на перенос в электромембранных системах с Firecrawl MCP и навыками скрейпинга.

entries.title: watch
entries.description: Let Claude watch a video. Downloads with yt-dlp, extracts auto-scaled frames with ffmpeg, pulls captions or falls back to Whisper, and hands frames + transcript to Claude so it can answer questions about the video.

entries.title: ripple
entries.description: Daily social post generator — fetches trending topics and writes ready-to-post copy for Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, and X.

entries.title: how-am-i-driving
entries.description: A graded report card on your Claude Code prompting — measured mechanical metrics plus a judged rubric, rendered as a Markdown report and a shareable HTML scorecard.

entries.title: clairvoyance
entries.description: A force multiplier for agent-to-human handoffs, turning work into evidence-backed decisions humans can trust.

entries.title: hiloop
entries.description: Operate hiloop from your agent: authenticate, create and fork sandboxes, run commands, and query fork-tree telemetry via the hiloop CLI.

entries.title: based-claude
entries.description: Research-grounded Claude Code workflow for production software work: disciplined context loading, scoped implementation, validation, review, safety, memory, and handoff.
